title: valerianella gioelbaschiensis
intro: Valerianella gioelbaschiensis, also known as Gioel's corn spurrey, is a species of annual plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Valerianella gioelbaschiensis include its potential to treat digestive issues and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Valerianella gioelbaschiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies as a poultice or topical cream to aid in wound healing and skin care.
